stories.title: Messi has no equals, and if not for him, Argentina...
stories.summary: Argentina's unbelievable comeback win over Egypt on Tuesday was all down to Lionel Messi, who is seemingly dragging his team to another final.

stories.title: Yankees make history, strike out 17 times again
stories.summary: In a 6-4 loss to the Rays on Tuesday night, the Yankees whiffed 17 times to become the first team in American League history to hit that mark in consecutive nine-inning games.

stories.title: Tatum: 'Tough' to see Brown go but proud of era
stories.summary: Jayson Tatum reflected on the "abrupt ending" of his longtime partnership with Jaylen Brown while appreciating what the pair accomplished together.

stories.title: Wiz reunite with Mavs' Middleton in sign-and-trade...
stories.summary: The Washington Wizards are bringing back veteran Khris Middleton on a three-year, $17.6 million contract via a sign-and-trade deal, his agent told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Royals' Tolbert (12 ABs, 12 hits) ties MLB record
stories.summary: Tyler Tolbert of the Royals tied a major league record with hits in 12 consecutive plate appearances, reaching the mark with an infield single in a 16-12 win over the Mets on Tuesday night.
